description: All proof types: schema versions, required fields, and validation rules.

entries.description: Output of a verification command (test, lint, build, typecheck). Captures full command execution details.

redaction_rules.conditions: When output contains secrets or PII detected by scanner

entries.description: Cryptographic hash of an artifact at a point in time. Used for integrity verification and tamper detection.
Output of a deterministic selection process (template selection, standards resolution). Records what was selected and why.
A human operator's attestation that a condition is met. Used for override approvals and manual gate checks.
Structured output of any executed command. More general than verification_log, used for build commands, migration scripts, etc.

redaction_rules.conditions: When output contains secrets or PII detected by scanner

entries.description: Result of a gate evaluation including all predicate checks and evidence consumed.
Coverage analysis result showing what percentage of targets are covered by plans, tests, or acceptance criteria.
Structured diff between two runs or artifacts. Used for regression detection and change tracking.
Result of a guardrail check (forbidden paths, secrets scan, plagiarism check, PII detection).

redaction_rules.conditions: When violations contain detected secrets or PII

entries.description: Result of an Axion compatibility check verifying artifacts still conform to current schemas.
